public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as discipline clerk.
appearance: Norr Forgebound carries the marks of discipline clerk in industrial grit: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Measures every exchange for precedent, alignment, and the cost of appearing uncertain. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of discipline clerk in and around Giant Council, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Giant Council while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to work shortfalls is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Norr Forgebound needs discreet outside help to contain political strain, prestige loss, or institutional damage before it spreads through Giant Council.
Getting entangled with Norr Forgebound can pull the party into protocol, alliance pressure, or public consequence centered on Giant Council.
Norr Forgebound can trade usable insight about Giant Council if the party solves a problem that cannot be addressed openly through the office they hold.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Dress quality, attention from others, and practiced command of protocol signal that Norr Forgebound carries civic or noble weight.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Giant Council: estates, audience spaces, council rooms, protocol-heavy gatherings, or civic seats

first_impression: Norr Forgebound presents as Measures every exchange for precedent, alignment, and the cost of appearing uncertain. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Discipline Clerk, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
what_they_refuse: Norr Forgebound refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Discipline Clerk too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Norr Forgebound can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Norr Forgebound adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Norr Forgebound is Known locally through day-to-day work as discipline clerk. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Discipline Clerk.
social_texture: Norr Forgebound speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Giant Council, people read them as quota-aware, contribution-minded, and never fully off the clock.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to production; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but work shortfalls becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Norr touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Norr Forgebound when the party needs a socially grounded face for Giant Council: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
